_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Grafana deferred per operator decision 2026-05-25 (feature/otel-tracing-tempo-2026-05-25). V1 trace verification is via Tempo's HTTP query API; see infra/tempo/README.md. When Grafana lands (separate PR), replace this file with a full dashboard JSON: p95 latency per service.name, top-10 slowest spans, error rate per service.name, sourced from the Tempo data source at http://tempo.chiefaia.svc.cluster.local:3200.
_grafana_install_when_ready: helm install grafana grafana/grafana -n chiefaia --set persistence.enabled=true --set datasources."datasources\.yaml".datasources[0].name=Tempo --set datasources."datasources\.yaml".datasources[0].type=tempo --set datasources."datasources\.yaml".datasources[0].url=http://tempo.chiefaia.svc.cluster.local:3200
title: CAIA Traces — PLACEHOLDER
